name: Italian Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen spinach (10 oz), thawed and drained
12 Large pimiento-stuffed green olives - cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Unroll dough and cut off one-fourth of dough crosswise; set aside.
3. Line a greased 9 1/4 x 5 1/4 x 2 1/2-inch loaf pan with the large piece of dough.
4. Moisten the dough with water at corners and press to seal.
5. Place one-half of the cheese on the bottom of the dough and top with sausage.
6. Spoon tomato sauce over sausage and sprinkle with oregano and basil.
7. Combine spinach with egg and spread over tomato sauce.
8. Layer pimientos on top of spinach and top with remaining cheese.
9. Arrange pepperoni on top of the cheese layer.
10. Top with olive halves.
11. Cover filling with reserved dough and crimp edges of dough to seal.
12. Cut slits in top of dough to allow steam to escape.
13. Bake for 50 minutes or until crust is well browned (if crust browns too quickly, cover loosely with aluminum foil).
14. Allow to cool 10 minutes before removing from pan and cutting into slices.
